Godrej Vanantara — 20-second Ad · 8 shots · one locked location

Your script, his grammar — dusk metro hook (towers as hero), looking-up towers, eye-level entrance, spacious interior, amenity hero · one locked project throughout · captions scrimmed + parked in the safe band.

The script (yours, verbatim) · ~20s

A South Bangalore township where the Pink Line metro lands at the gate — just for ₹10,500 a square foot. This is Godrej Vanantara on Bannerghatta Main Road. Analysts are calling 46% appreciation in five years. 36 acres, 2 to 4 BHK from ₹1.28 crore, possession 2030, ₹10 lakh in EOI benefits. Book your private walk-through.

Format9:16 reel
Run-time~20s
Shots8
Avg hold2.5s
Cuts7
Location1 (locked)

Why this fixes the last cut

  • One believable place, not 30. Every shot is image-to-image off a single locked master — same towers, same green core, same Bangalore street. It reads as a real project you could drive to, not a moodboard.
  • Shots breathe. 8 shots / 7 cuts over 20s = ~2.5s each (the competitor's rhythm), vs the old 36 cuts at 0.9s. Scale actually lands — open holds 3s on the whole township.
  • It looks like South Bangalore. Established leafy corridor, arterial road + metro, garden-city tree canopy — the project is the hero, the city sits close but never competes.
  • Captions live in the safe zone. Parked in the central reading band, clear of the top 12% (handle), bottom 20% (caption/CTA) and right 14% (action rail) — readable on mute. Toggle the guide above to verify.
Godrej | VANANTARA
